```{r, setup-common}
#| file: "setup.R"
#| echo: false
#| results: "asis"
```
```{r, setup-local}
#| include: false
#| cache: false
data(band_members, band_instruments, band_instruments2, package = "dplyr")
data(relig_income, population, us_rent_income, fish_encounters,
     table2, table3, table4a, table5, package = "tidyr")
```
